instruction: Which are the top 10 product categorys by total catalog sales revenue in 2000?
context: The catalog merchandising team wants to identify which product category drive the most catalog revenue to prioritize print placements and catalog page allocation.

aggregation_logic.Total Catalog Revenue: SUM(CAST(cs_net_paid AS DECIMAL)) grouped by product category for year 2000

chain_of_thought: Identify catalog_sales as the fact table for catalog channel transactions.
Join to item dimension to access the product category attribute.
Join to date_dim and filter to d_year = 2000.
Cast cs_net_paid from VARCHAR to DECIMAL(15,2) for numeric aggregation.
Aggregate with SUM grouped by product category and order descending by revenue.
Return the top 10 rows using LIMIT.
sql:
SELECT
  i.i_category AS i_category,
  SUM(CAST(cs.cs_net_paid AS DECIMAL(15,2))) AS total_catalog_revenue
FROM catalog_sales cs
JOIN date_dim d ON cs.cs_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
JOIN item i ON cs.cs_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
WHERE d.d_year = 2000
GROUP BY i_category
ORDER BY total_catalog_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;
